revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月27日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 27일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月廿七]][[zh:六月廿七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月27日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 27일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月廿七]][[zh:六月廿七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月27日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 27일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月廿七]][[zh:六月廿七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月27日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 27일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月廿七]][[zh:六月廿七]]
{{Not to be confused with|June 27|qq=June 27}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=六月廿七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 6월 27일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar June|qq=}} '''June 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|June (Lunisolar)|ja|6月 (旧暦)|lt=June (Minazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 6th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Eikyō|en|Eikyō|qid=Q1193059|lt=Eikyō|1=Eikyō}} 11 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|August 6|en|August 6|qid=Q2787|lt=August 6|1=August 6}} , {{ill|1439|en|1439|qid=Q6380|lt=1439|1=1439}} ) – {{ill|Asukai Masayo|ja|飛鳥井雅世|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asukai Masayo|1=Asukai Masayo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q22124005}} completed compilation of the {{ill|Shinshokukokin Wakashū|en|Shinshokukokin Wakashū|qid=Q771119|lt=Shinzoku Kokin Wakashū|1=Shinshokukokin Wakashū}} . * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 10 (Julian calendar {{ill|July 16|en|July 16|qid=Q2731|lt=July 16|1=July 16}} , {{ill|1582|en|1582|qid=Q6719|lt=1582|1=1582}} ) – The {{ill|Kiyosu Conference|ja|清洲会議|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyosu Conference|1=Kiyosu conference|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1588884}} was held at Kiyosu Castle to determine the successor to {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|qid=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}} . {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qid=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} , supporting Nobunaga's grandson Sanpōshi ({{ill|Oda Hidenobu|en|Oda Hidenobu|qid=Q1187442|lt=Oda Hidenobu|1=Oda Hidenobu}} ), gained control.
== Births == * {{ill|Eiwa|en|Eiwa|qid=Q1145780|lt=Eiwa|1=Eiwa}} 3/{{ill|Tenju|en|Tenju|qid=Q1145023|lt=Tenju|1=Tenju}} 3 (Julian calendar {{ill|August 1|en|August 1|qid=Q2788|lt=August 1|1=August 1}} , {{ill|1377|en|1377|qid=Q6289|lt=1377|1=1377}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Komatsu|en|Emperor Go-Komatsu|qid=Q123052|lt=Emperor Go-Komatsu|1=Emperor Go-Komatsu}} , the 100th emperor (6th of Northern Court) (d. {{ill|1433|en|1433|qid=Q6356|lt=1433|1=1433}} ) * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 7 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 11|en|August 11|qid=Q2778|lt=August 11|1=August 11}} , {{ill|1795|en|1795|qid=Q7815|lt=1795|1=1795}} ) – {{ill|Hayashi Genchū|ja|林玄仲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayashi Genchū|1=Hayashi Genchū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17220843}} , physician and official (d. {{ill|1878|en|1878|qid=Q7776|lt=1878|1=1878}} )<ref>磯部郷土史刊行会 編（1963）：263ページ</ref>
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 9 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 27|en|July 27|qid=Q2719|lt=July 27|1=July 27}} , {{ill|1581|en|1581|qid=Q6717|lt=1581|1=1581}} ) – {{ill|Yusa Tsugumitsu|ja|遊佐続光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yusa Tsugumitsu|1=Yusa Tsugumitsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11640333}} , military commander from the {{ill|Sengoku period|en|Sengoku period|qid=Q204023|lt=Sengoku|1=Sengoku period}} to {{ill|Azuchi–Momoyama period|en|Azuchi–Momoyama period|qid=Q319531|lt=Azuchi-Momoyama period|1=Azuchi–Momoyama period}} (b. unknown) * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 17 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 14|en|August 14|qid=Q2775|lt=August 14|1=August 14}} , {{ill|1640|en|1640|qid=Q6901|lt=1640|1=1640}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Yasushige|en|Matsudaira Yasushige|qid=Q10791131|lt=Matsudaira Yasu Shige|1=Matsudaira Yasushige}} , lord of {{ill|Kisai Domain|en|Kisai Domain|qid=Q3034467|lt=Kisai Domain|1=Kisai Domain}} , {{ill|Kasama Domain|en|Kasama Domain|qid=Q3034461|lt=Kasama Domain|1=Kasama Domain}} , and {{ill|Kishiwada Domain|en|Kishiwada Domain|qid=Q3034469|lt=Kishiwada Domain|1=Kishiwada Domain}} (b. {{ill|1568|en|1568|qid=Q6648|lt=1568|1=1568}} ) * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|qid=Q1373146|lt=Bunka|1=Bunka}} 6 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 8|en|August 8|qid=Q2780|lt=August 8|1=August 8}} , {{ill|1809|en|1809|qid=Q6919|lt=1809|1=1809}} ) – {{ill|Ueda Akinari|en|Ueda Akinari|qid=Q714175|lt=Ueda Akinari|1=Ueda Akinari}} , yomihon author, Kokugaku scholar, and poet (b. {{ill|1734|en|1734|qid=Q6977|lt=1734|1=1734}} )
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|6|26|6|28|5|27|7|6|0627|qq=}}
